ayahs.translation: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen
To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer
[It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent

ayahs.arabic: تَعۡرُجُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيۡهِ فِي يَوۡمٖ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهُۥ خَمۡسِينَ أَلۡفَ سَنَةٖ
ayahs.translation: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years
ayahs.transliteration: TaAAruju almalaikatu waalrroohu ilayhi fee yawmin kana miqdaruhu khamseena alfa sanatin

ayahs.translation: So be patient with gracious patience
Indeed, they see it [as] distant
But We see it [as] near
On the Day the sky will be like murky oil
And the mountains will be like wool
And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend

ayahs.arabic: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمۡۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِي مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِئِذِۭ بِبَنِيهِ
ayahs.translation: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children
ayahs.transliteration: Yubassaroonahum yawaddu almujrimu law yaftadee min AAathabi yawmiithin bibaneehi

ayahs.translation: And his wife and his brother
And his nearest kindred who shelter him

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
ayahs.translation: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him
ayahs.transliteration: Waman fee alardi jameeAAan thumma yunjeehi

ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell]
A remover of exteriors
It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
And collected [wealth] and hoarded
Indeed, mankind was created anxious
When evil touches him, impatient
And when good touches him, withholding [of it]
Except the observers of prayer
Those who are constant in their prayer
And those within whose wealth is a known right
For the petitioner and the deprived
And those who believe in the Day of Recompense

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ
ayahs.translation: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum min AAathabi rabbihim mushfiqoona

ayahs.translation: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe
And those who guard their private parts

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزۡوَٰجِهِمۡ أَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَإِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُومِينَ
ayahs.translation: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed
ayahs.transliteration: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena

ayahs.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبۡتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡعَادُونَ
ayahs.translation: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors
ayahs.transliteration: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona

ayahs.translation: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
And those who are in their testimonies upright
And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer
They will be in gardens, honored
So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muhammad]
[To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups

ayahs.arabic: أَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٖ
ayahs.translation: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure
ayahs.transliteration: AyatmaAAu kullu imriin minhum an yudkhala jannata naAAeemin

ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know

ayahs.arabic: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغَٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
ayahs.transliteration: Fala oqsimu birabbi almashariqi waalmagharibi inna laqadiroona

ayahs.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيۡرٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
ayahs.translation: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone
ayahs.transliteration: AAala an nubaddila khayran minhum wama nahnu bimasbooqeena

ayahs.arabic: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوضُواْ وَيَلۡعَبُواْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.translation: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ سِرَاعٗا كَأَنَّهُمۡ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٖ يُوفِضُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yakhrujoona mina alajdathi siraAAan kaannahum ila nusubin yoofidoona

ayahs.arabic: خَٰشِعَةً أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةٞۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised
ayahs.transliteration: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun thalika alyawmu allathee kanoo yooAAadoona
